en: This requirement is triggered because you indicated your organization has a Joint Prevention Service (SPM) in the Spain Occupational Risk Prevention Services Applicability Assessment.
Spain Occupational Risk Prevention Services - Joint Prevention Service
Employers are required to assess and prevent workplace risks and to implement preventive measures to protect workers’ health and safety. Law 31 Royal Decree 39 Royal Decree 171
